sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29889" key="e(bdomagenh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑβδομᾱ-γενής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n29889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born on the seventh day</tr_> [of the month], epith. of Apollo, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.717e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
